hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot write sensitive files (.env, .pem, .key)' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // ""'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then lines=$(wc -l < "$file" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$lines" -gt 1000 ]; then echo "WARNING: $file is $lines lines (>1000 limit). Consider splitting." >&2; fi; fi; exit 0
